about.label: What's behind this?
about.lead: You're not reading a CV. Every answer is generated live by a LLM, grounded in a private, evolving picture of how Oscar Fanelli thinks and works.

points.title: Live
points.body: Each reply is composed in the moment.

points.title: A model of me
points.body: The source is refined day by day — it evolves as I do. Here simplified and exposed with guardrails.

points.title: I rely on it myself
points.body: Beyond this page, I consult that same digital version of myself to pressure-test decisions, revisit my past reasoning, and move faster on real work.

points.title: It can get me wrong
points.body: It's an interpretation, so it can misread or oversimplify. For anything that really matters, please talk to the real Oscar. When it doesn't know, your question is recorded so I can answer it here in the future.

about.openSource: Open source. See how it's built.
